data.content: Because Multiple Apps includes a built-in mechanism that requires users to update the application every 90 days. However, the app has recently been removed from the Google Play Store. As of today, the 90-day deadline has been reached, which triggers the mandatory update process. Unfortunately, the app is no longer able to redirect users to the Play Store to complete this update. To ensure continued access, we have set up an official website where users can directly download and install the latest version of the app. We understand that this situation has caused concern and criticism. However, the removal of Multiple Apps from the Play Store was not our decision, but an action taken by Google. So please update the latest version from official website(Safety absolutely).
